query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name') FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='ceph_health_status' ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT max(value) AS value FROM (SELECT s.value AS value, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='ceph_health_status' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='ceph_health_status' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000))) WHERE cluster='$cluster'

SELECT sum(value) AS value FROM (SELECT s.fingerprint AS fp, argMax(s.value, s.unix_milli) AS value, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='ceph_osd_up' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='ceph_osd_up' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY fp, cluster) WHERE cluster='$cluster'

SELECT sum(value) AS value FROM (SELECT s.fingerprint AS fp, argMax(s.value, s.unix_milli) AS value, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='ceph_mon_quorum_status' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='ceph_mon_quorum_status' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY fp, cluster) WHERE cluster='$cluster'

SELECT max(value) AS value FROM (SELECT s.value AS value, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='ceph_pg_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='ceph_pg_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000))) WHERE cluster='$cluster'

SELECT max(value) AS value FROM (SELECT s.value AS value, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='ceph_cluster_total_used_bytes' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='ceph_cluster_total_used_bytes' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000))) WHERE cluster='$cluster'

SELECT max(value) AS value FROM (SELECT s.value AS value, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='ceph_cluster_total_bytes' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='ceph_cluster_total_bytes' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000))) WHERE cluster='$cluster'

SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, 'used' AS series, avg(value) AS value FROM (SELECT s.unix_milli AS unix_milli, s.value AS value, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='ceph_cluster_total_used_bytes' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='ceph_cluster_total_used_bytes' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000))) WHERE cluster='$cluster' GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

SELECT pool_id, max(value) AS stored FROM (SELECT s.value AS value, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'pool_id') AS pool_id, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='ceph_pool_stored' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='ceph_pool_stored' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000))) WHERE cluster='$cluster' GROUP BY pool_id ORDER BY stored DESC

SELECT pool_id, toUInt64(max(value)) AS objects FROM (SELECT s.value AS value, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'pool_id') AS pool_id, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='ceph_pool_objects' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='ceph_pool_objects' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000))) WHERE cluster='$cluster' GROUP BY pool_id ORDER BY objects DESC

SELECT time, 'read' AS series, sum(rps) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, greatest(max(s.value) - min(s.value), 0) / $__interval_s AS rps FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='ceph_pool_rd_bytes' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='ceph_pool_rd_bytes' AND JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name')='$cluster' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

SELECT time, 'write' AS series, sum(rps) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, greatest(max(s.value) - min(s.value), 0) / $__interval_s AS rps FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='ceph_pool_wr_bytes' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='ceph_pool_wr_bytes' AND JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name')='$cluster' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

SELECT time, 'read op/s' AS series, sum(rps) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, greatest(max(s.value) - min(s.value), 0) / $__interval_s AS rps FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='ceph_osd_op_r' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='ceph_osd_op_r' AND JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name')='$cluster' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

SELECT time, 'write op/s' AS series, sum(rps) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, greatest(max(s.value) - min(s.value), 0) / $__interval_s AS rps FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='ceph_osd_op_w' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='ceph_osd_op_w' AND JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name')='$cluster' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time
